title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Virgin Space Limited
body: "Application number 5086  Applicant Virgin Enterprises Limited objected to the name used by Virgin Space Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Virgin Space Limited is changed to 15420186, LTD. "
